meta.siteTagline: Always grounded on the factory floor.
meta.siteSubTagline: Japan-quality bags, made in China and Myanmar.

hero.headline: Always grounded on the factory floor.
hero.subheadline: Founded in 2003. A bag OEM/ODM factory with 20+ years serving the Japanese market — twin facilities in Shandong (China) and Yangon (Myanmar) handling backpacks, totes and business bags from small runs to mass production.
hero.imageAlt: Bag production on the factory floor

strengths.title: Five reasons clients stay with us
strengths.subtitle: Twenty years on the factory floor taught us what matters.

dualFactory.title: Twin facilities, China + Myanmar
dualFactory.desc: Shandong handles sampling, rush and small batches. Yangon handles mass production. One company, two playbooks.

sampling.title: Qingdao sample center, 1-week turnaround
sampling.desc: Queue time and build time are quoted separately. Two reasonable revisions are standard; we ask for a settled design before we start.

quality.title: Japan-grade two-stage QC
quality.desc: Spec sheets, BOM, first-piece sign-off. X-ray needle detectors in both China and Myanmar. Third-party audits welcome.

experience.title: Since 2003, only for Japan
experience.desc: Twenty plus years dedicated to the Japanese market — from trading houses to listed brands to digital-native EC labels.

commercial.title: Payment terms that fit your team
commercial.desc: FOB or CIF. T/T 30/70 for new partners, 1-week terms long term, L/C for larger orders.

painPoints.title: Five problems buyers tell us about
painPoints.subtitle: Most of the friction around China sourcing is fixable. Here is how we fix it.

language.problem: Communication with the factory breaks down. Progress is invisible.
language.solution: A Japanese-speaking PM owns your project end to end and sends a weekly update — every week.

rush.problem: No factory will take a rush job.
rush.solution: Our China site ships in 30 days at the shortest. Urgent runs are routed through the Qingdao sample center directly.

smallLot.solution: China site starts from a few hundred units. Myanmar takes 1,500 units per SKU/colour. We are happy to begin with a trial run.

pricing.problem: The quote is a black box — hard to defend internally.
pricing.solution: We break the quote down by MOQ, material and process so you have something to walk into the meeting with.

transparency.problem: We do not know who is actually making the bag.
transparency.solution: Visit any of our three sites — Qingdao, Shandong, Yangon. If travel is hard, we run a 1-day Zoom walk-through instead.

quality.title: Quality & Inspection
quality.intro: Two-stage inspection and X-ray needle detection keep mass-production quality stable.
quality.overview: Both factories in Shandong (China) and Yangon (Myanmar) have dedicated QC teams and on-site inspectors. A two-stage process from in-line to pre-shipment inspection is combined with 100% X-ray detection and optional third-party audits.

ipqc.label: In-process inspection (IPQC)
ipqc.body: Sampling on the sewing line to catch and correct defects early.

oqc.label: Pre-shipment inspection (OQC)
oqc.body: Appearance, dimensions, accessories and packaging are checked before packing.

xray.label: X-ray detection (100%)
xray.body: Every piece is checked for broken needles and metal contamination.

audit.label: Third-party audit (optional)
audit.body: We support brand/trading-company inspections and third-party audits.

quality.xrayBody: One unit in China and two in Myanmar, with 100% detection as standard.
quality.certNote: (XXX - status and issuable scope to be confirmed)
quality.ctaText: Feel free to ask about inspection standards or samples.

leadTime.title: Lead Time & Supply
leadTime.intro: Clear per-stage timelines let you plan supply with confidence.
leadTime.overview: Myanmar bulk runs take about 3 months after PP sample approval; the domestic (Shandong) site can start shipping in as little as 30 days depending on materials.

materials.label: Material sourcing & domestic handling
materials.body: Supplier production and domestic logistics; shorter if stock is available.

warehouse.label: Inspection at Dongguan warehouse
warehouse.body: Materials are consolidated and inspected; 1-2 days for in-stock items.

shipping.label: International shipping & customs
shipping.body: Dongguan loading -> vessel wait (~3 days) -> sea transit (~1 week) -> Yangon clearance (~3 days).

production.label: Mass production
production.body: Standard run time after PP sample approval.

leadTime.totalNote: About 1 month from sourcing to factory arrival; roughly 4 months including production.
leadTime.rushBody: The Shandong factory can begin staggered shipping in as little as 30 days, materials permitting.

variables.consolidation: Consolidation wait: time to fill a container for shared shipping.
variables.queue: Production queue: starts per factory schedule, not immediately after materials arrive.

leadTime.routeNote: Logistics route: Dongguan warehouse -> Yangon port.
leadTime.ctaText: We propose sites and plans tailored to your target dates.

strength.intro: Choosing a bag OEM factory is not only about price and lead time. Ease of communication, response to last-minute changes, the reassurance of a company that has stood in the same place for 20 years — these intangibles are why clients stay.

oemFlow.intro: From first inquiry to shipping, every step's duration and deliverable is made explicit.

inquiry.q: What should I prepare for the first inquiry?
inquiry.a: Just a rough idea of category, quantity and desired lead time. Attach design files if you have them.

sampling.q: How many sample revisions are covered?

production.q: What is the standard production lead time?
production.a: About 3 months after PP sample sign-off (Myanmar mass production).

factory.intro: Two countries, three sites — sampling, small batches and mass production, each at the right place.

qingdao.name: Qingdao Sample Center
qingdao.subtitle: Development, sampling, revision, costing. First sample in as little as 1 week.

shandong.name: Shandong (China)
shandong.subtitle: Sampling, rush jobs and multi-SKU runs

qingdao.overview: Our sampling center in Qingdao handles development, sample making, revisions and costing. Once the design direction is set, a first sample can be ready in as little as one week.
qingdao.orderScale: Suited to trial and small-lot inquiries.
qingdao.access: In Qingdao city; accessible by car from Liuting / Jiaodong International Airport. (XXX - exact address and access to be confirmed)

shandong.overview: Our own factory in Rizhao, Shandong: about 8,000 sqm with around 100 sewing staff. A domestic site for sampling, small lots, multi-style and rush orders.
shandong.orderScale: From a few hundred to tens of thousands per style.

myanmar.overview: Better Bags Myanmar in Yangon: around 370 sewing staff and extensive equipment for medium-to-large lots, repeat orders and labor-intensive long runs.
myanmar.logistics: Materials are consolidated at the Dongguan warehouse and delivered to the factory via Yangon port.
myanmar.visaNote: For Myanmar factory visits, please apply 1-2 weeks ahead for visa and travel arrangements.
